title: Bahrain Bourse ends Monday’s session down
summary: A total of 776,858 shares were traded during the session at a value of BHD 255,628
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
PHOTO

Arab Finance: The All-Share Index of Bahrain Bourse (BHB) edged down 0.22% on Monday, closing the trading session at 1,929.49 points, compared to 1,933.69 points in the previous session.

A total of 776,858 shares were traded during the session at a value of BHD 255,628.

The trading session concluded with the total market cap hitting BHD 29.331 billion.
